title: NEBNext Ultra II RNA Library Prep Kit: Bead Purification of Ligation Reaction
author: Opentrons
materials: NEBNext Ultra II RNA Library Prep Kit

steps.title: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and...
steps.instruction: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and P300 pipettes to perform library prep steps on 8-48 input total RNA samples according to the attached NEB user guide. This is part-5 of a six part process (bead purification of the ligation reaction). User-determined parameters are available to specify the number of samples and the magnet engage height and time. ---

steps.title: Use settings in the OT app...
steps.instruction: Use settings in the OT app to pre-cool the temperature module in slot 1 to 4 degrees C prior to running this protocol.

steps.title: The protocol will alert the user...
steps.instruction: The protocol will alert the user to ensure reagents are present on deck in sufficient volume.

steps.title: The p300 multi will add NEBNext...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will add NEBNext Sample Purification Beads to the adapter-ligated cDNA samples in the magnetic module plate and mix.

steps.title: The OT-2 will wait 10 minutes for an on-deck incubation
steps.instruction: The OT-2 will wait 10 minutes for an on-deck incubation.

steps.title: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads
steps.instruction: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads. The p300 multi will remove and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: The p300 multi will wash the...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will wash the bead pellets twice with 80 percent ethanol.

steps.title: The OT-2 will wait for the...
steps.instruction: The OT-2 will wait for the bead pellets to air dry.

steps.title: The magnets will disengage for elution
steps.instruction: The magnets will disengage for elution.

steps.title: The p20 multi will add 0
steps.instruction: The p20 multi will add 0.1X TE and mix to resuspend the beads.

steps.title: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads
steps.instruction: The magnets will engage to pellet the beads.

steps.title: The p20 multi will recover the...
steps.instruction: The p20 multi will recover the eluate to the output plate.
